event: Saint Catherine of Alexandria with Her Attributes
symbols: crown — her royal lineage as a princess of Alexandria
palm branch — the victory of martyrdom over death
broken wheel at her feet — the spiked wheel of her torture that miraculously shattered
sword — the instrument of her beheading after the wheel failed to kill her
book — her learning and wisdom, for which she confounded the pagan philosophers
description: A seated young woman in an elegant white satin dress with pink-lavender drapery, wearing a small crown atop her light brown hair. She holds a palm branch in her left hand and rests her right hand on the hilt of a sword. At her feet, a broken spiked wheel lies on the ground beside a book. She sits against a dark background, her face serene and her gaze directed at the viewer. The frame is an ornate gilded Baroque frame visible around the painting.
